sqlMap.select: SELECT ATTITUDE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, DEPT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, MODAPPL, REGION, MOBILE, BIZSUB, CONTENT, IP, DATE_TYPE, TYPE_ID FROM tbl_attitude WHERE WRITER_ID = #pidList# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(START_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= #UTCStartDate# AND DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(START_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') < #UTCEndDate#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, DEPT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, REGION, MOBILE, BIZSUB, CONTENT, IP, DATE_TYPE, TYPE_ID) VALUES( #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #deptId#, IFNULL(#startDate#, ''), IFNULL(#endDate#, ''), IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select.isEqual: SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_conf WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
